description.short: Live Azure DevOps cockpit: work items, PRs, and pipeline health.
description.full: Engineering Command Center brings your Azure DevOps work into Microsoft 365 Copilot. See your active work items, pull requests awaiting review, and recent pipeline runs in a live, interactive dashboard, then let Copilot triage your day, draft standup updates, and chase down failing builds. Built with the MCP Apps SDK so the widget renders via postMessage — no outbound fetch needed.
